tasks.label: adb reverse 3000
args: $adb = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $adb)) { Write-Output 'adb not found, skipping reverse.'; exit 0 }; $devices = & $adb devices; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output 'adb devices failed, skipping reverse.'; exit 0 }; $usable = $devices | Select-Object -Skip 1 | Where-Object { $_.Trim() -and $_ -match '\tdevice$' }; if (-not $usable) { Write-Output 'No adb device found. Skipping reverse.'; exit 0 }; & $adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output 'adb reverse failed, skipping.'; exit 0 }
